authorization_law.note: Part 28: presence of a cloud/RunPod API key or credential does NOT constitute a budget or a launch authorization. A sealed budget object (all required_fields present + operator-signed) is the ONLY authorization to provision paid resources.

HAWKING_CLOUD_BUDGET.description: Sealed total-spend ceiling. ABSENT -> lane BLOCKED. Its mere presence is NOT authorization; must accompany a full sealed budget object.

HAWKING_CLOUD_MAX_HOURLY.description: Sealed max price per pod-hour. ABSENT -> no per-hour ceiling can be enforced -> provisioning refused.

HAWKING_CLOUD_MAX_HOURS.description: Sealed wall-clock ceiling in hours. ABSENT -> runtime watchdog cannot be armed -> provisioning refused.

purpose: Declares the fields a sealed cloud-cost authorization MUST contain before any paid resource may be provisioned. No values are populated: NO cloud budget is authorized (HAWKING_CLOUD_BUDGET absent). The CUDA/RunPod lane is BLOCKED. This is a schema + budget contract ONLY - launch nothing.

approved_gpu_classes.description: Allow-list of GPU SKUs permitted for this budget. A pod on any class not on this list is refused/terminated.

budget_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all spend fields (e.g. 'USD').

cloud_provider.description: Provider identifier for the paid lane (e.g. 'runpod'). No default; must be explicit.

egress_policy.description: What may leave the pod and where. Artifacts/receipts pull back to the Apple/main lane; no other egress.

allowed_destinations.description: Explicit allow-list of egress destinations (e.g. the network volume, operator-controlled object store).

max_egress_spend.description: Ceiling on egress spend, counted against max_total_spend.

no_source_egress.description: Model source weights never leave the pod; only quantized artifact + sealed receipts return.

max_gpu_count.description: Max total GPUs summed across all live pods. Refused above this count.

max_hourly_price.description: Max acceptable price per pod-hour. Pod create is refused above this; a running pod exceeding it is terminated.

max_pod_count.description: Max number of concurrently live pods across the lane. Provisioning beyond this count is refused.

max_runtime.description: Wall-clock ceiling per pod (and lane). Idle+runtime watchdog terminates on breach.

max_total_spend.description: Hard ceiling on cumulative spend for the entire lane. Cost monitor auto-terminates at this ceiling.

storage_budget.description: Persistent + container storage caps and their spend.

container_disk_gb.description: Max ephemeral container disk per pod.

max_storage_spend.description: Ceiling on storage spend, counted against max_total_spend.

network_volume_gb.description: Max size of the network volume.

termination_policy.description: Conditions under which pods are auto-terminated and how teardown is proven.

auto_terminate_on.description: Trigger set: budget, idle, failure, integrity, drain, completion.

on_disconnect.description: Behavior if the controller loses contact (default: terminate).

require_teardown_receipt.description: Terminate must emit a sealed teardown receipt (pod id, final cost, volume disposition).

validation.verdict: NO sealed budget -> CUDA/RunPod lane BLOCKED. Provisioning plan only; launch nothing.
